name: recent-data-leaks
description: A live, server-rendered timeline of public data breaches.

scripts.seed: node -e "const {aggregate}=require('./api/_aggregate'); aggregate().then(f=>{if(!f.items.length){console.error('refusing to overwrite snapshot with an empty feed; errors:',f.errors);process.exit(1);} f.items=f.items.map(({details,...r})=>r); require('fs').writeFileSync('data/feed.json', JSON.stringify(f)); console.log('seeded fallback snapshot:', f.items.length, 'items');})"
